importNotes: Document-level metadata will be populated when PPW #195 (48-document Lincoln v4 core corpus inventory) is implemented. The 28-document baseline reflects the original lincoln-metaphor-analysis core set; v4 expansion adds 20 documents to reach 48.

documentTiers.description: Fully annotated core set; receives passage segmentation, claim extraction, and scoring
Lighter annotation; used for inter-annotator reliability sampling
Indexed for search only; not annotated
